## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss ongoing projects, workload management, and strategic initiatives for GrowthX.ai's content marketing operations.](https://fathom.video/share/3az7u-zKhxP9f2DgmxwhsdZg5cnhrJQR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team is working to increase capacity through new hires and workflow improvements](https://fathom.video/share/3az7u-zKhxP9f2DgmxwhsdZg5cnhrJQR?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Focus on developing high-quality, developer-focused content for Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/3az7u-zKhxP9f2DgmxwhsdZg5cnhrJQR?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Need to improve strategy and information gain in content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/3az7u-zKhxP9f2DgmxwhsdZg5cnhrJQR?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
  - [Exploring partnerships (e.g., SEMrush) to establish authority in AI SEO space](https://fathom.video/share/3az7u-zKhxP9f2DgmxwhsdZg5cnhrJQR?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
